response.original_title: How do I recover my account on Kraken? {{Recover Account}
response.overview: To recover your account on Kraken, ⭐1-858-423-8635 the process depends on whether you have forgotten your password⭐1-858-423-8635, lost access to your two-factor authentication (2FA), locked ⭐1-858-423-8635 yourself out due to too many failed attempts, or no longer have access to your registered email address, and Kraken provides specific recovery pathways for each scenario due to its strong security emphasis. If you have ⭐1-858-423-8635 forgotten your password but still have access to your registered email and ⭐1-858-423-8635 your 2FA method, go to the Kraken website (kraken.com) or mobile app, click "Sign in," then select "Forgot password?" and enter your email address; Kraken will send a ⭐1-858-423-8635 password reset link to that inbox, and after clicking the link you can create a new strong ⭐1-858-423-8635 password, after which you will need to enter your 2FA code to complete the login and regain full access immediately.
